title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 06 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 06 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 06 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.05 % today, the main contract closed at 925.The steel mills are not active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less. According to the shipping data tracked by SMM, both overseas shipments and domestic arrivals have increased this week.
